title: Add mock research queue ranking (Golden Test 9)
problem: ticket-011 preserves contradictions but no module ranks candidate sources by relevance, credibility, and gap value. Golden Test 9 requires a research queue that ranks fixture sources deterministically with machine-readable reasons and rejects low-credibility marketing pages.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 9: research queue ranks sources by relevance, credibility, and gap value.
acceptance_criteria: research queue (or equivalent scoped CLI) ranks fixture candidate sources deterministically without Ollama.
Empirical paper ranks above marketing page; each queue item has reason, status, source type, relevance, credibility, and gap value per Golden Test 9.
non_goals: Do not implement public export, LangGraph, theory generation, or live source discovery.
Do not implement full research run contract orchestration.
rollback_plan: Revert branch phase-1/ticket-012-mock-research-queue. Delete candidate queue rows from local SQLite test DBs if needed.
